overview.description: The ProShares S&P 500 Dynamic Buffer ETF (FB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Daily Dynamic Buffer index. The fund tracks an index that invests in the S&P 500 stocks while employing an options strategy designed to provide capped gains and buffer against the first 1% to 5% of S&P 500s losses. FB was launched on Jun 24, 2025 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Launches Groundbreaking Suite of Dynamic Buffer ETFs
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares Dynamic Buffer ETFs capture gains and target downside protection with a patent-pending approach that adapts daily to expected volatility.
